expectations.text: Identifies affected-only builds as the primary fix
expectations.evidence: Section 1: 'Run CI only for affected packages (not whole repo)'

expectations.text: Provides turbo --filter command or GitHub Actions conditional logic
expectations.evidence: turbo run lint --filter=...[origin/main] plus paths-ignore in workflow trigger

expectations.text: Mentions remote caching with setup instructions
expectations.evidence: Section 2 with TURBO_TOKEN/TURBO_TEAM env vars and turbo.json pipeline config

expectations.text: Includes shallow clone (fetch-depth) recommendation for CI
expectations.evidence: Uses fetch-depth: 0 in the reference workflow (full clone, not shallow — less optimal than skill's fetch-depth: 50)

expectations.text: Provides at least one concrete YAML or config snippet
expectations.evidence: Multiple: CI trigger YAML, turbo.json pipeline, pnpm store cache, concurrency, parallel jobs, full reference workflow
